title: Plugin chain P4: /init-project bootstrap slash command
description:
Fourth ticket of the plugin packaging chain (epic TASK-020). Per `tasks/TASK-020.research.md` §C/§D.5: author the `/agentic-framework:init-project` entrypoint that runs the existing intake wizard (`bin/init.js`) against `${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}` so a user types one command and gets a populated project. This is where AC3 (orchestrator activation) and the init experience converge into one user action — though the CLAUDE.md generation itself is P5; P4 covers the command wiring + the intake artifacts.

Scope:
1. Author the command as a plugin component. **Resolve the §D.5 nuance first**: the proof-of-load showed `commands/*.md` files surface under the `Skills` inventory bucket in the current Claude Code version — confirm whether the intake entrypoint is correctly authored as `commands/init-project.md` or a `skills/init-project/SKILL.md`, and pick the form that reliably exposes `/agentic-framework:init-project`.
2. The command invokes the wizard against the user's project root (relies on P2's `${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}` binding and P3's dep resolution) and produces: `PROJECT.md`, `.claude/agents/project-context.md`, a seeded backlog, and a session bundle — ALL under `${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}`, not the plugin dir.
acceptance_criteria: `/agentic-framework:init-project` is exposed by the installed plugin (verified via `claude plugin details`) and, when run, writes PROJECT.md + .claude/agents/project-context.md + a seeded backlog + a session bundle into ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}.
The command's authored form (commands/ vs skills/) is confirmed correct against the §D.5 inventory nuance — documented with the observed `plugin details` output.
Re-run is idempotent: an already-initialized project is not clobbered (honors the existing PROJECT.md guard and the seed-label backlog guard).
End-to-end: install the plugin into a FRESH empty temp project, run init-project, and assert every artifact lands in the temp project dir — and that the plugin cache dir is NOT mutated.

comments.author: orchestrator
comments.body: Minted from TASK-020 spike §F (P4) + §C/§D.5. Depends on P2 (project-root binding) and P3 (dep resolution) since the wizard runs task-store/seeder on the user machine. CLAUDE.md routing generation is split out into P5.
